response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate with a unique profile. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, he demonstrates deep expertise in a comparable systems language (Dlang) through multiple roles and personal projects, particularly in building low-latency, high-performance applications. Crucially, he has significant, passion-driven experience in the geospatial domain as the founder of GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform. This combination of systems programming and direct domain experience makes him a compelling fit, despite the language mismatch. An interview is recommended to assess his ability to transition his skills to C++ and to explore the depth of his geospatial knowledge as it relates to routing.
strengths: Extensive experience founding and building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven expertise in low-latency systems programming in a high-throughput microservices environment.
Demonstrates strong initiative and a problem-solving mindset through numerous self-started projects.
concerns: Primary C++ development experience is dated (2014-2015), and it's not listed in his main skills section.
Geospatial experience seems focused on data collection and mapping, not specifically on routing or tile optimization.
Experience is very broad across many languages, which may indicate a lack of deep, recent specialization in C++.
